title: Move interactive widgets from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets
description: Move the beam button, entity card, create card, and emoji picker widgets. These are the interactive showcase widgets with animations and user interaction. They depend on foundation widgets from tasks 3-4.
context:
Files to move:

**Beam Button** — 3 files in pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/beam_button/` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/`:
- beam_button.dart — Animated button with sweeping light beams. Imports: context_extension (context.colors), BeamButtonBorderRevealPainter, BeamLinePainter
- beam_line_painter.dart — CustomPainter for sweeping beam on a line. No pew_pew imports.
- beam_button_border_reveal_painter.dart — CustomPainter for border reveal on hover. No pew_pew imports.

**Entity Card** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_entity_card.dart` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/cards/t_entity_card.dart`:
- Imports: FontFamily, context_extension, TDurations, cursor_preview, hover_icon_button, t_emoji_picker_popover, TProvider (TColors, TSizes)
- Complex widget with spotlight, animated hover, press feedback, optional floating preview

**Create Card** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_create_card.dart` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/cards/t_create_card.dart`:
- Needs reading from pew_pew_plaza

**Emoji Picker** — pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/t_emoji_picker_popover.dart` → turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/misc/t_emoji_picker_popover.dart`:
- Imports: emoji_picker_flutter, context_extension, ShadCN, TProvider
- Also imports t_category_view_with_search_on_left.dart and t_emoji_search_view.dart — these supporting files MUST also be moved.

**Supporting files that must also move:**
- t_category_view_with_search_on_left.dart → read to discover its imports
- t_emoji_search_view.dart → read to discover its imports

These supporting files may have their own dependencies — read them and move whatever chain is needed.
instructions: Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read ALL source files from pew_pew_plaza: beam_button/*.dart, t_entity_card.dart, t_create_card.dart, t_emoji_picker_popover.dart, t_category_view_with_search_on_left.dart, t_emoji_search_view.dart.
Chase any further pew_pew_plaza widget imports that t_category_view_with_search_on_left or t_emoji_search_view depend on. Move those too.
Read the turbo_widgets files created by tasks 1-4 to know correct import paths.
Use `cp` (Bash) to copy each source file to its target path, then use apply_edits to fix imports. NEVER rewrite files from scratch. Replace FontFamily.xxx with TFontFamilies.xxx via apply_edits.
Place emoji picker and its supporting files in `lib/src/widgets/misc/`.
Do NOT add exports to the barrel file — task 9.
acceptance_criteria: BeamButton and its 2 painter files exist in lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/
Emoji picker and ALL its supporting widgets exist in lib/src/widgets/misc/
No file imports anything from pew_pew_plaza
Internal widget cross-references use turbo_widgets paths (e.g., TEntityCard imports cursor_preview from turbo_widgets)
constraints: CRITICAL: Use `cp` to copy source files from pew_pew_plaza to target paths, then use apply_edits to fix imports. NEVER rewrite files from scratch — agents hallucinate content when rewriting. Copy first, patch imports second.
Do NOT change widget APIs or behavior
Move ALL transitive pew_pew_plaza widget dependencies that the emoji picker chain requires
goals: All interactive showcase widgets are self-contained within turbo_widgets
non_goals: Making the emoji picker more generic
worklog: Copied 8 files via cp, then patched imports with apply_edits. Files created: lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/beam_button.dart (3 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/beam_line_painter.dart (straight copy), lib/src/widgets/buttons/beam_button/beam_button_border_reveal_painter.dart (straight copy), lib/src/widgets/cards/t_entity_card.dart (7 import fixes + 4 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/cards/t_create_card.dart (3 import fixes + 2 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/misc/t_emoji_picker_popover.dart (4 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/misc/t_category_view_with_search_on_left.dart (straight copy), lib/src/widgets/misc/t_emoji_search_view.dart (straight copy). All diffs verified — only import lines and FontFamily→TFontFamilies changes. Zero pew_pew_plaza imports remain. No supporting files needed beyond the 2 emoji files listed in the task.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Record all supporting files that were moved beyond the listed ones. Add their paths to task 9 so they get exported.
